problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
